name: Maple-Barbecued Oven Spareribs
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except spare ribs in a bowl.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil.
3. Wipe spareribs with damp paper towels.
4. Brush sauce on both sides of ribs.
5. Place ribs in a shallow, open roasting pan.
6. Bake for 1-1/2 hours, basting frequently with remaining sauce and turning to glaze.
